title: 18 Inch Happy Birthday Balloons, Birthday Balloons for Women, Happy Birthdays Balloon Girls, HSC Pink Sleepover Party Foil Balloon, 5Pcs HAPPY BIRTHDAY Themed Decorations for Party Supplies
features: Elegant Sleepover-Themed Design These 18-inch pink foil balloons feature a stylish "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" message surrounded by sleepover-themed patterns including eye masks, lipsticks, and combs. Perfect for adding a fun and personalised touch to birthday celebrations, especially for women and girls.

Versatile Party Decoration Ideal for sleepover parties, birthday celebrations, and other festive occasions. These balloons can be used as wall decor, table centrepieces, or photo backdrop accents, creating a cohesive and Instagram-worthy party atmosphere.

Durable and Reusable Material Made from high-quality Mylar foil, these balloons are lightweight yet durable. They can be filled with air or helium and are designed to hold their shape for extended periods, making them suitable for both indoor and outdoor events.

Easy to Inflate and Display Each balloon is self-sealing and can be quickly inflated using a hand pump, helium tank, or straw. No tying is required, and they can be easily attached to walls or arches with tape or glue dots for hassle-free decorating.

Thoughtful Gift or Party Addition With a pack of five balloons, this set offers great value and ensures you have enough decorations to create a festive space. Their charming design and reusable nature also make them a delightful gift for birthday enthusiasts.
description: Product description 🎈 Make Your Party Shine with Themed Balloons Add a playful and elegant touch to your birthday decorations with these beautiful pink foil balloons. Each balloon features a distinctive “HAPPY BIRTHDAY” message along with cute patterns including eye masks, lipsticks, and combs—making them perfect for a pajama-themed party or sleepover celebration! ✨ Perfect for Multiple Occasions Birthday Party Decor: Whether it’s for a teen girl, a women’s birthday, or a fun slumber party, these balloons help create a coordinated and Instagram-worthy setting. Themed Gatherings: Great for girls' nights, pajama parties, birthday sleepovers, and other casual yet festive events. Versatile Decoration Use: Use them as part of a balloon arch, wall backdrop, table centerpiece, or even outdoor party decor. 📦 What You’ll Receive Quantity: 5 foil balloons Size: 18 inches in diameter Color: Pink Design: “HAPPY BIRTHDAY” text with eye mask, lipstick, and comb illustrations Material: Reliable and lightweight foil 💡 Tips for Best Results Inflate using a hand pump or helium for a smooth finish. Avoid over-inflation to extend the life of your balloons. Use clear tape or command dots for secure placement on walls and surfaces. Store in a dry area away from heat or sharp objects to preserve quality. ⚠️ Please Note Balloons may arrive folded—gentle inflation will help smooth out wrinkles. Slight color variations may occur due to lighting and screen differences. Safety Warning No
